articles.title_en: Ruble leads world currencies in gains against dollar. That’s cutting into revenues for Russian exporters and the state budget.
articles.lead_en: The Russian ruble was the world’s best-performing currency against the U.S. dollar in the second quarter of 2026, the Bloomberg news agency reported.
